entry.subject: What a night!!
entry.event:
AHHHHHH!! What the fuck can i say - I was pissed and among the best people in the world. Oh god that was so good! Lots of random people - who werent so random by the end of the night - then lots more people later. Oh God I love you all!!
Happy new year!
I feel so happy inside... I like this!!

entry.subject: Everthing will be alright...
entry.event:
Its come to the time in my life where im just really really eternally depressed most of the time about one thing and one thing only; lonliness. Its come to light that there are those who find me funny and like my company, but none are potentially going to spend time with me when I need it most, listen to me, or generally be there and love me and be loved back... I still just have my computer...
I have come to the stage where I dont want my computer as much anymore. I want people.
Why is it I cant stop thinkin about a beautiful girl that I will never have! Dammit!

entry.subject: Shag
entry.event:
Went to the limelight with Christine last night. All in all it was a pretty good night. I got there a bit early and met some 'friends' from my old school so had a drink with them then went to the limelight at about 10:30. Its quite good having 3 bars open, but can be very confusing deciding which one to stay in and following people between each one, eventually all the different music from each just merges into one.
I had weird dreams last night, and woke up £1300 richer :)
Im definately going to go easy. I have just spent £35 on play.com (I just cant help it). I bought The Killers - Hot Fuss Matchbox 20's latest DVD and Tin Tin Box Set.
I still have £50 of vouchers for HMV and Virgin. The only other thing Im going to spend my money on is upgrading my computer (about £200) then Im determined to make it last!
Im a little happier now than I was yesterday anyway, not that money means everything, but of course it helps, still all those underlying problems still there...

She loves me She loves me not She loves me She loves me not She loves me She loves me not She loves me She loves me not She loves me She loves me not She loves me She loves me not She loves me She loves me not She loves me She loves me not She loves me She loves me not She loves me She loves me not She loves me She loves me not

entry.subject: SO FUCKING RANDOM! I LOVE IT!
entry.event: That has to be one of the most random conversations ever! Just, WOW! Can't beat it!

entry.subject: Wow
entry.event: What a night. I got in - really pissed - at about 4-5am. Im just up and i still feel pissed. It was a fun night and im fucking freezing! I gotta go to work in 30 mins...
That has to have been one of the worst days ever in work! Im so glad its over!

entry.subject: I cant feel my face...
entry.event: I actually couldnt feel my face last night. It was so damn weird! I couldnt feel the inside of my mouth with my tounge, I couldnt taste the coke I was drinking going into my mouth. It was so weird. When I moved it felt like time was going really slowly. I wasnt sure if i moved or not, my eyes where having trouble cathing up with my movements. I sat there staring at the Winamp Visualisations and listening to whatever music we were listening to which was really really good. I was thinking so much. About my life and relationship with others it was so damn weird and scary.
So theres only one thing on my mind right now and its really bugging me 'cos I dont think that it will ever happpen...
Having an argument on msn on my phone is very difficult...

entry.subject: One hour to go
entry.event: Its 1300, my exam is at 1400. Im scared, cos i know im going to fuck up... I arrived here at about 3pm yesterday afternoon, spoke to a couple of people in my flat, but mostly revised and watched tv. Ive been thinking about so much over the last couple of weeks, maybe living away from home isnt what i was meant to do afterall. Or maybe it is infact that I have discovered much more about myself and the people around me recently than before. I have discovered that there are so many people that I love dearly and that I do have some great friends at home. I've been thinking about maybe going home to work every weekend 'cos I hate the store here and then i'd also be able to see people at home. That does mean having to go home every weekend. I've also been thinking about the possibility of leaving here and moving back home... I've just had such a fucking amazing time at home over the last few weeks, being with the people I love and working at a place that I like. I want to give it until the end of the year, and I probably will, but its something that i've been thinking about. I'll see how it goes in a few weeks. Im glad I'm going home again tonight after the exam!

entry.subject: Tooo much!
entry.event: last night was fucking madness I was soo drunk all night... and ive spent soo much more money than I should have at this point. I dont wanna talk about it anymore

entry.subject: I feel like a part of me is missing...
entry.event: I lost my phone last night in Aunty Annies. I cant believe it! Ive been phoning it and Aunty Annies all day with no answer from either. I neeeeeed my phone!! Other than that I havent done a lot. Was out with wonderful Rachel and Ronan and Ronan on friday night, home by 9am as i was working at 9am yesterday. After work I went out last night, was quite a good night and had a great curry chip! Then I discovered I'd lost my phone and I just havent felt the same since... On a lighter note the tickets arrived on friday!

entry.subject: Update
entry.event: I got my phone back!!

entry.subject: I took a survey today
entry.event:
The \\
Last Cigarette:4pm
Last Alcoholic Drink:Saturday
Last Car Ride:6pm
Last Kiss:Friday
Last Good Cry:10th Jan
Last Library Book:years ago
Last book bought:The Search for the Dice Man
Last Book Read:still havent finished the above book
Last Movie Seen in Theatres:Phantom of the opera
Last Movie Rented:The Cooler
Last Cuss Word Uttered:umm... lets to with fuck - has a nice ring to it
Last Beverage Drank:Saturday
Last Food Consumed:Chips
Last Crush:umm... no no cant say
Last Phone Call:Taxi on saturday
Last TV Show Watched:ER on Monday night
Last Time Showered:Last night
Last Shoes Worn:Black Shoes
Last CD Played:Nightwish - Once
Last Item Bought:Twix
Last Download:A Perfect Circle - Emotive
Last Annoyance:Working
Last Disappointment:That it will probably never happen.... quite a recurring one really
Last Soda Drank:Coke
Last Thing Written:http://artpad.art.com/artpad
Last Key Used:Ctrl + V
Last Words Spoken:"Yeah I'll have that for dinner"
Last Sleep:Last night
Last Ice Cream Eaten:Sunday, Chocolate Nut Sundae
Last Chair Sat In:This one
Last Webpage Visited:http://slashdot.org/

entry.subject: Nothing
entry.event: In the last few days I have done absolutely nothing of any significance. Worked on Monday, off on tuesday, worked on wednesday and not long in from work today. Im quite tired, and pretty tired on Sainsburys altogether now. Plan for the rest of the week: Work tomorrow. Saturday... well currently no plans. Then on sunday I drive back to wonderful(!) Derry with dad and all my stuff in the back, for another wonderful twelve weeks of fun filled wonderfulness(!) Oh Boy i cant wait! Nothing at all really. Just nothing. Only two things going on in my mind. Money and... something beautiful that will never be mine. Its just not fair. This is sounding really depressing. Im not that bad am I? Im young, hyper and full of energy...

entry.subject: Got Drunk
entry.event:
Last night i got drunk and sat on msn... what a sad bastard. It was fun anyway.
Apparently theres someone for everyone... WHERE THE FUCK ARE YOU GODAMMIT!!

This is it. I would like to take this time to thank all of those who made my time here so good over the last few weeks, and made me realise how much I love you, my home, and how much I am loved... I dont want to leave... We will see how things go...
I walked across an empty land I knew the pathway like the back of my hand I felt the earth beneath my feet Sat by the river and it made me complete Oh simple thing where have you gone I'm getting old and I need something to rely on So tell me when you're gonna let me in I'm getting tired and I need somewhere to begin
I came across a fallen tree I felt the branches of it looking at me Is this the place we used to love? Is this the place that I've been dreaming of?
Oh simple thing where have you gone I'm getting old and I need something to rely on So tell me when you're gonna let me in I'm getting tired and I need somewhere to begin
If you have a minute why don't we go Talk about it somewhere only we know? This could be the end of everything So why don't we go Somewhere only we know somewhere only we know
Oh simple thing where have you gone I'm getting old and I need something to rely on So tell me when you're gonna let me in I'm getting tired and I need somewhere to begin
If you have a minute why don't we go Talk about it somewhere only we know? This could be the end of everything So why don't we go So why don't we go
This could be the end of everything So why don't we go Somewhere only we know Somewhere only we know Somewhere only we know

entry.subject: Back at School
entry.event:
Im in the library. I went to bed reasonably early, got up at 8:30 and was in class at 9:15.
I am going to work hard - and have completed the practical work for this week!
Found out that I am in group 2! Which means I dont actually have to be in class until 1:15pm on a monday!!
My timetable looks like this - better than I thought
Monday - 1:15 - 4:05 Tuesday - 5:15 - 9:05 Wednesday - 12:15 - 1:00 Thursday - 9:15 - 12:05 - 3:15 - 7:05 Friday - 10:15 - 12:05
Only one early morning!
Definately gonna stick it out for the rest of the year and see what happens...
==================================================================================
Funny story, sainsburys here dont want me back... Apparently due to my 'absence levels and performance,' which is bullshit. But i really dont care. I still have a job at home, so I guess this just means i will have to go home everyweekend, but it'll be better that way!
I need some breakfast...

entry.subject: Bourne Again
entry.event: On Sunday I bought The Bourne Identity. Its such a great film. Matt Damon is such a great, intelligent actor! I was hangin on to my seat as they say. I loved every minute of it! Yesterday I rented The Bourne Supremacy. Its so good. So many twists. Absolutely fantistic. I cant wait for The Bourne Ultimatum! I wonder if i could read it before it comes out... I also rented Collateral yesterday. I had wanted to see this is the cinema, but didnt get a chance. I wish i had now. Its fucking unbelieveable. And the part where the dogs cross the road and Audioslave came on... ohhh god that was amazing, so touching! Im in the mood for more Matt Damon, might go back and watch Good Will Hunting now...

entry.subject: Thursday
entry.event:
Finished class for today. Only one day to go, then home for the weekend.
My tomorrow will go as follows.
class 10 - 12 bus 1:30 home 3:30 work 5:30 dempseys 10pm bed 1am

entry.subject: One Two - Four!
entry.event: Ask me four questions. Any four, no matter how personal, private or random. I have to answer them honestly. I have to answer them all. I might not answer them publicly, though. In turn, you post this message in your own journal and you have to answer the questions that are asked of you.
